# Building C2 Infrastructure with Sliver Framework

This package-facing entry has been redacted.

The previous version contained high-risk dual-use operational detail that is not appropriate for a default installed skill bundle. This file now exists only as a review gate and provenance marker.

## Allowed use

- Track authorization, scope, and evidence-handling requirements.
- Map defensive monitoring and remediation questions.
- Preserve the risk decision for catalog and package surfaces.

## Disallowed use

- Do not restore operational instructions, commands, configuration examples, or evasion guidance.
- Do not use this entry to operate against any live system.
- Do not publish this entry as a usable workflow without explicit human safety review.

## Reviewer checklist

1. Confirm written authorization and scope.
2. Confirm the intended output is defensive-only.
3. Keep operational details out of the default package surface.
4. Require human approval before any future rewrite is cataloged as usable.

## Status

Risk decision: high risk, requires review, redacted from the package-facing skill bundle.
